name: Le Poulet Rouge Apple Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Sour mash whiskey, to taste
recipeInstructions:
The night before, peel the apple and cut into large pea-sized chunks. Toss with 2 tablespoons of sugar. Cut or tear croissants into bite-size pieces.
Combine the croissant and apple chunks with milk and raisins. Stir to distribute ingredients. Cover and refrigerate overnight or for at least 12 hours.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, whisk together eggs, vanilla, sugar, and nutmeg until combined. Pour this custard mixture over the croissant and fruit mixture and stir well.
Pour the mixture into a buttered 8-by-11-inch glass baking dish. Bake for 1 hour or until puffy and browned. As soon as removed from the oven, pour whiskey sauce over top. Let cool about 5 minutes before serving with mounds of whipped cream. Serves 8.
Whiskey Sauce:
Whisk egg into melted butter. Stir in powdered sugar and whiskey, mixing well. The sauce may be made up to 24 hours ahead. It keeps for 2 to 3 days in the refrigerator.
